title: Everbuild 502 All Purpose Weatherproof Wood Adhesive – Suitable for typical Wood Bonding Applications – 1 Litre
features: ALL PURPOSE – This high-quality, resin-based adhesive is suitable for most wood bonding applications.
USE INSIDE AND OUT – The adhesive is suitable for both interior and exterior use and well as for general woodworking and joinery uses.
SUPERIOR STRENGTH – Provides a high-strength, impact-resistant bond that can be stronger than the wood itself.
NON-STAINING – Product will not stain or discolour wood.
DRIES CLEAR – Contains no inert fillers and dries clear for a professional-looking finish. The water-based formula provides easy clean up.
D3 GRADE - High degree of water resistance, D3 certified.
MULTIPLE SIZES – Bottles come in various sizes up to 1L. 5L and 25L jerry cans are also available, as well as larger drums.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces must be clean, dry and free from grease. Apply adhesive thinly to both surfaces. Do not over apply as this will slow down cure. Clamp surfaces together until adhesive dries (off in 1-2 hours: full strength 8 hours). Support until fully cured (8 hours at 20°C). When fitting dowels, the adhesive should be applied to the holes. Suitable for radio frequency curing. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
